summary.key_theme: 公司憑藉 AI 資料中心連接技術實現強勁成長，獲得多家機構看好並給予高目標價，但近期股價急漲後引發估值過高與潛在替代風險的擔憂。

bullish.title: Why Is Credo Technology Stock Soaring Monday? — Credo Technology (CRDO) stock hits new 52-week highs after Stifel and Evercore issue bullish price targets up to $350.
bullish.reason: Stifel 與 Evercore 等知名機構給予高達 $350 的目標價，直接推動股價創下 52 週新高，顯示市場對其 AI 業務前景極度樂觀。

bullish.title: CRDO (NASDAQ:CRDO) Shines in CANSLIM Screen with Explosive Growth and Strong Leadership
bullish.reason: 符合 CAN SLIM 選股標準，具備 231% 的盈餘成長與 157% 的營收成長，且零負債的財務結構增強了投資人信心。

bullish.title: How Credo Technology Group’s (CRDO) 1.6T Connectivity Ramp Is Feeding Its AI Data-Center Growth
bullish.reason: 詳細分析了 1.6T 連接技術在 AI 資料中心領域的擴張潛力，為公司長期成長提供了堅實的產業基本面支撐。

bullish.title: The Brown Capital Management Small Company Fund Picked Credo Technology (CRDO) Amid Multiple Durable Growth Drivers
bullish.reason: 知名基金 Brown Capital Management 將其納入投資組合，顯示機構投資人對其成長驅動力的認可。

bullish.title: Credo Technology (CRDO) Starts With Outperform Rating as Optical AI Connectivity Opportunity Expands
bullish.reason: 新啟動的「優於大盤」評級進一步確認了光學 AI 連接市場的擴張機會，強化了市場對其競爭優勢的看法。

bullish.title: Credo Technology (CRDO) Earns New Analyst Upgrade, Shares Climb to Fresh Peak
bullish.reason: 分析師升評帶動股價攀升，反映了市場對公司短期動能的正面情緒。

bullish.title: CRDO (NASDAQ:CRDO): High Growth Momentum Breakout Setup for Aggressive Investors
bullish.reason: 技術面顯示強勁的成長動能與突破形態，吸引積極型投資人關注。

bearish.title: Credo Is Not Micron; Sell (Rating Downgrade) — Credo Technology (CRDO) downgraded to Sell after a 50% rally.
bearish.reason: 在股價經歷 50% 的大幅上漲後，分析師將評級下調至「賣出」，警告估值過高風險，並強調其與 Micron 等記憶體大廠的業務性質差異。

bearish.title: Credo Technology (CRDO) Slid Amid Replacement Risk Concerns
bearish.reason: 市場開始擔憂技術替代風險，導致股價出現回調，顯示投資人對其長期技術護城河的穩定性產生疑慮。

neutral.title: This Credo Technology Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Monday
neutral.reason: 此報導為多檔股票的綜合報導，僅提及 CRDO 的啟動評級，資訊量較為分散，故歸類為中性參考。
